rows.source_ref: muhiuddin, "Best Trading System (Only Momentum)" / MOMENTUM PRICE SYSTEM, ForexFactory forum thread #423512 (n.d., archived 2026-07-24), https://www.forexfactory.com/thread/423512-best-trading-system-only-momentum
rows.concept: Reversal at momentum exhaustion: enter against price when the Momentum(28) indicator diverges from price and then breaks its own prior swing extreme (point F).
rows.eligibility_reason: Momentum divergence + momentum-swing-break trigger, price-based stop (point C) and measured-move TPs are mechanizable in pure MQL5 (pivot-lookback divergence detection); no ML/external runtime; FX/JPY/crude data available; defined stops = FTMO/DXZ compatible.
rows.notes: Rules: Momentum period 28 (close), divergence drawn over 8-28 bars; SHORT = price higher-high while momentum lower-high (mark highest price C, lowest momentum F); enter on close when F penetrated with 2 lots; SL at price C; TP1 = |C - entry| (exit 1 lot, SL->BE); TP2 = 2xTP1 (trail 50% of profit); TP3 = 4xTP1; LONG is the mirror. Divergence-line identification is subjective and must be parameterized (pivot lookback) to be deterministic -> PARTIAL. Evidence is forum anecdote only: author self-reports 3.5-10%/month with 32% DD over 11 months, forward-tested, no backtest; one member reported very few H4 signals. Author claims it works on all FX pairs incl. JPY crosses (CADJPY/GBPJPY examples) and crude oil (XTIUSD in our universe), untested on gold/silver; H4-D1 swing (avg hold ~4 days). Variants mentioned in thread (same core concept, not separate rows): CCI14 divergence on M15/H1 (PAMPAQ #51), and homealbum's vague EMA(21,8)+Bollinger 'price action' comment (#56) too vague to build. A community MT4 divergence indicator (Momentum Divergence2_mtf+alerts.mq4) was attached, confirming the divergence detection is automatable.

notes: single-author momentum-divergence system; forum discussion otherwise; CCI14 and EMA+Bollinger mentions folded into notes as variants/chatter
